category_sources: Official chrony documentation lists chronyd daemon and chronyc command-line interface.
source_facts.description: versatile implementation of the Network Time Protocol (NTP).
display_name_sources: Official project site brands the project as chrony.
docs_sources: Official chrony project documentation page lists current and versioned manual pages.
repo_sources: Official chrony download/contributing pages state the git repository is https://gitlab.com/chrony/chrony.
